sites.name: USCCB Daily Bible Reading
sites.description: Official U.S. Catholic Bishops' daily Mass readings, audio podcast, and liturgical calendar. Authoritative source for US dioceses.

sites.name: EWTN Daily Readings
sites.description: EWTN's daily Mass readings with online video of daily Mass, reflections, and a global televised Mass guide.

sites.name: Universalis
sites.description: Full Liturgy of the Hours, daily Mass readings, saints' biographies and feasts, and regional calendar options worldwide.

sites.name: Catholic Online – Daily Readings
sites.description: Daily readings, saint of the day, prayers, rosary, and a comprehensive Catholic encyclopedia.

sites.name: Dynamic Catholic – Mass Readings Today
sites.description: Daily Mass readings with reflections and daily inspiration, from Dynamic Catholic.

sites.name: USCCB Lecturas del Día
sites.description: Official U.S. Catholic Bishops' daily Mass readings in Spanish. Full primera lectura, salmo, segunda lectura, and evangelio, drawn from the Mexican Lectionary approved for US use.

sites.name: Vatican News – Evangelio y Lecturas del Día (Spanish)
sites.description: Vatican News Spanish edition: full daily Mass readings (primera lectura, salmo, segunda lectura, evangelio) with a papal reflection. Audio available.

sites.name: Ciudad Redonda – Lecturas del Día
sites.description: Run by the Dominican Order (Spain). Full daily Mass readings — primera lectura, salmo, segunda lectura, and evangelio — plus a homily/reflection. Ideal for following the Mass in Spanish-speaking countries.

sites.name: ChiesaCattolica.it – Liturgia del Giorno
sites.description: Official website of the Italian Bishops' Conference (CEI). Daily liturgy, Liturgy of the Hours, saint of the day, and the Bible.

sites.name: LaChiesa.it – Liturgia di Oggi
sites.description: Perpetual liturgical calendar, daily readings, Gospel of the day, and homilies in Italian.

sites.name: Vatican News – Vangelo e Parola del Giorno (Italian)
sites.description: Vatican News Italian edition: daily Gospel and daily Word accompanied by papal thoughts.

sites.name: AELF – Messe du Jour
sites.description: The official Association Épiscopale Liturgique pour les pays Francophones. Full daily Mass readings for all French-speaking countries: première lecture, psaume, deuxième lecture, and évangile, with the complete texts.

sites.name: Église Catholique en France – Textes de la Messe du Jour
sites.description: Official French Bishops' Conference website. Full daily Mass readings including première lecture, psaume, deuxième lecture, and évangile, with homily resources.

sites.name: Vatican News – Évangile et Lectures du Jour (French)
sites.description: Vatican News French edition: full daily Mass readings with a papal reflection and audio. Follows the Roman liturgical calendar.

sites.name: Erzabtei Beuron – Schott Tagesliturgie
sites.description: The Archabbey of Beuron's famous 'Schott' daily liturgy: Mass readings, prayers, and the liturgical year in German. Widely considered the gold standard for German Catholic liturgical content.

sites.name: Katholisch.de – Kalenderblatt / Tagesliturgie
sites.description: Official portal of the Catholic Church in Germany. Daily liturgy, Liturgy of the Hours, name days, saints, and Catholic news.

sites.name: Vatican News – Evangelium des Tages (German)
sites.description: Vatican News German edition: daily Gospel and papal reflections.

sites.name: CNBB – Liturgia Diária
sites.description: Official daily liturgy from the Brazilian Bishops' Conference (CNBB). Daily Mass readings in Portuguese for Brazil and Portuguese-speaking countries.

sites.name: Vatican News – Evangelho do Dia (Portuguese)
sites.description: Vatican News Portuguese edition: daily Gospel and Word of the Day with papal reflections.

sites.name: Evangelizo – Português
sites.description: Free daily Mass readings and Gospel reflections in Portuguese. Available online and via email subscription.

sites.name: カトリック中央協議会 (Catholic Bishops' Conference of Japan)
sites.description: Official website of the Catholic Bishops' Conference of Japan. Liturgical resources, daily Mass booklets ('Mainichi no Misa'), and the Japanese Catholic liturgical calendar.

sites.name: 霊性センターせせらぎ – 毎日のみことば
sites.description: Daily Word of God (weekday and Sunday readings) in Japanese with spiritual reflections from the Spirituality Center Seseragi.

sites.name: Vatican News – 今日の福音 (Japanese)
sites.description: Vatican News Japanese edition: daily Gospel and Word of the Day.

notes: There is no major dedicated Afrikaans-only Catholic liturgical website. The Catholic Church in South Africa primarily ministers in English. The best resources for Afrikaans-speaking South African Catholics are the English-language South African Catholic sites and the Universalis South Africa calendar below.

sites.name: Universalis – South Africa
sites.description: Universalis with the South African liturgical calendar applied. Full daily Mass readings and Liturgy of the Hours in English, calibrated for the Southern African Catholic Bishops' Conference calendar.

sites.name: Archdiocese of Cape Town – Daily Mass Readings
sites.description: Daily Mass readings for South African Catholics provided by the Archdiocese of Cape Town.

sites.name: Southern African Catholic Bishops' Conference (SACBC)
sites.description: Official portal of the Southern African Catholic Bishops' Conference. News, pastoral letters, and links to liturgical resources for southern Africa.

notes: Nigeria does not have a unique liturgical language. Nigerian Catholics worship primarily in English, using the Roman Rite approved by the Catholic Bishops' Conference of Nigeria (CBCN). The sites below serve the Nigerian Catholic community specifically.

sites.name: Nigeria Catholic Network – Daily Readings & Reflections
sites.description: Official network of the Catholic Secretariat of Nigeria (CSN). Daily readings with reflections from Nigerian priests and religious. The primary hub for the Catholic Church in Nigeria.

sites.name: Catholic Readings – Nigeria Tag
sites.description: CatholicReadings.org curated content tagged for Nigeria, including saint of the day, daily reflections, and readings.

sites.name: Vatican News – English (used widely in Nigeria)
sites.description: Vatican News English edition: daily Gospel and Word of the Day with papal reflections, widely used by Nigerian Catholics.

sites.name: Soiscéal an Lae – Evangelizo (Irish)
sites.description: The first dedicated Irish-language (Gaeilge) daily Mass readings service, launched in 2024. A collaboration between Evangelizo and Irish-language volunteers. Full permission granted by An Bíobla Naofa. Endorsed by the Irish Bishops' Conference.

sites.name: CatholicIreland.net – Readings (with Irish option)
sites.description: Ireland's main Catholic news and resource site. Daily readings in English with a 'Léachtaí Gaeilge' (Irish readings) link for each day. Also features saints, reflection, and Church news.

sites.name: Universalis – Ireland
sites.description: Full Liturgy of the Hours and daily Mass readings calibrated to the Irish liturgical calendar (in English).
